textByRace.goblin: Shiny. Probably worthless. You want it anyway.
textByRace.human: A coin, but the metal is wrong. A fake.
textByRace.elf: The craftsmanship is crude. This was made to deceive.

droppedTextByRace.goblin: Something shiny on the ground. You feel your pulse quicken.
droppedTextByRace.human: A coin glints on the ground. Someone dropped it.
droppedTextByRace.elf: Something small and metallic lies here. It feels false.
